title: paeonia anomala var. hybrida
intro: Paeonia anomala var. hybrida, also known as Woodland Peony or Chinese Peony, is a plant species in the Paeoniaceae family, characterized by its delicate white flowers and heart-shaped leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Paeonia anomala var. hybrida include its ability to relieve menstrual cramps, reduce fever, and alleviate anxiety and depression. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a variety of health conditions.
